name: deadbolt
description: Keyless, evidence-backed security audits and fix recommendations for repositories you own.

interface.shortDescription: Audit code and triage security risks honestly.
interface.longDescription: A keyless Codex Skill that audits security requests and recommends fixes with source evidence. It remains read-only: patches and re-analysis belong to Deadbolt's separate API-backed TypeScript engine.
defaultPrompt: Use $deadbolt to audit this repository read-only, cite evidence, and recommend fixes without claiming patches were applied.
